name: pipedrive-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Pipedrive CRM integration with Claude Code

api_key.title: Pipedrive API Key
api_key.description: Your Pipedrive API token. Find it at Settings > Personal preferences > API in Pipedrive.

mode.title: Capability mode
mode.description: Server-enforced safety tier. One of: 'read-only' (reads only), 'safe-write' (reads + non-destructive writes), or 'full' (all tools, including destructive deletes/conversions). Unrecognized values fall back to read-only.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_deals
tools.description: List deals from Pipedrive with optional filtering by owner, person, organization, pipeline, stage, or status. Returns paginated results.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_deal
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific deal by ID, including all standard and custom fields.

tools.name: pipedrive_create_deal
tools.description: Create a new deal in Pipedrive. Only title is required; all other fields are optional.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_deal
tools.description: Update an existing deal in Pipedrive. Specify the deal ID and any fields to update.

tools.name: pipedrive_search_deals
tools.description: Search for deals by text in title. Supports fuzzy matching by default.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_deal
tools.description: Delete a deal. The deal will be marked as deleted and permanently removed after 30 days.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_deal_followers
tools.description: List all followers for a deal.

tools.name: pipedrive_add_deal_follower
tools.description: Add a follower to a deal.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_deal_follower
tools.description: Remove a follower from a deal.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_deal_followers_changelog
tools.description: Get the followers changelog for a deal.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_deal_products
tools.description: List line-item products attached to a deal. Returns paginated results.

tools.name: pipedrive_add_deal_product
tools.description: Attach a single product as a line item to a deal.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_deal_product
tools.description: Update a line-item product attached to a deal. All body fields optional.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_deal_product
tools.description: Remove a line-item product from a deal.

tools.name: pipedrive_bulk_add_deal_products
tools.description: Bulk-add up to 100 line-item products to a deal in one request.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_deal_discounts
tools.description: List all additional discounts applied to a deal.

tools.name: pipedrive_add_deal_discount
tools.description: Add an additional discount to a deal.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_deal_discount
tools.description: Update an additional discount on a deal. All fields except IDs are optional.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_deal_discount
tools.description: Delete an additional discount from a deal.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_deal_installments
tools.description: List installments across one or more deals. Requires deal_ids. Growth+ plan required.

tools.name: pipedrive_add_deal_installment
tools.description: Add an installment (payment schedule entry) to a deal. Growth+ plan required; the deal must have at least one one-time product and no recurring products.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_deal_installment
tools.description: Update an installment on a deal. Growth+ plan required; all body fields optional.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_deal_installment
tools.description: Delete an installment from a deal. Growth+ plan required.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_archived_deals
tools.description: List archived deals with the same filtering as the active deals list (owner, person, organization, pipeline, stage, status). Returns paginated results.

tools.name: pipedrive_convert_deal_to_lead
tools.description: Convert a deal to a lead (async job). DESTRUCTIVE: a successful conversion marks the source deal as deleted. Returns a conversion_id; the conversion runs asynchronously, so you MUST poll pipedrive_get_deal_conversion_status with the conversion_id until a terminal status. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_get_deal_conversion_status
tools.description: Get the status of a deal-to-lead conversion job. Status contract: 'completed' (terminal, carries lead_id), 'failed'/'rejected' (terminal, stop polling, no lead produced), 'not_started'/'running' (in-progress, re-poll). Only 'completed' carries lead_id, and conversion status is purged after a few days, so a 404 returned after a prior valid status means the status was purged (terminal stop-polling signal, not a transient error). Use a bounded poll budget (e.g. up to ~6 attempts with short backoff), not an unbounded loop.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_persons
tools.description: List persons (contacts) from Pipedrive with optional filtering by owner, organization, or first letter of name.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_person
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific person by ID.

tools.name: pipedrive_create_person
tools.description: Create a new person (contact) in Pipedrive. Only name is required.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_person
tools.description: Update an existing person in Pipedrive.

tools.name: pipedrive_search_persons
tools.description: Search for persons by name, email, or phone number.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_person
tools.description: Delete a person. The person will be marked as deleted and permanently removed after 30 days.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_person_followers
tools.description: List all followers for a person.

tools.name: pipedrive_add_person_follower
tools.description: Add a follower to a person.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_person_follower
tools.description: Remove a follower from a person.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_person_followers_changelog
tools.description: Get the followers changelog for a person.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_person_picture
tools.description: Get the picture for a person (read-only; returns picture metadata and sized image URLs). Returns an error if the person has no picture.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_activities
tools.description: List activities from Pipedrive with optional filtering by owner, deal, person, organization, type, or completion status.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_activity
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific activity by ID.

tools.name: pipedrive_create_activity
tools.description: Create a new activity in Pipedrive. Subject and type are required.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_activity
tools.description: Update an existing activity in Pipedrive. Use this to mark activities as done.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_activity
tools.description: Delete an activity.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_notes
tools.description: List notes from Pipedrive with optional filtering by deal, person, organization, or lead.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_note
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific note by ID.

tools.name: pipedrive_create_note
tools.description: Create a new note in Pipedrive. Content is required. Link to a deal, person, organization, or lead.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_note
tools.description: Update an existing note in Pipedrive.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_note
tools.description: Delete a note.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_leads
tools.description: List active (non-archived) leads from Pipedrive with optional filtering by owner, person, or organization.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_archived_leads
tools.description: List archived leads from Pipedrive with optional filtering by owner, person, or organization.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_lead
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific lead by UUID.

tools.name: pipedrive_create_lead
tools.description: Create a new lead in Pipedrive. Title is required; link to at least one of person_id or organization_id.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_lead
tools.description: Update an existing lead in Pipedrive.

tools.name: pipedrive_search_leads
tools.description: Search for leads in Pipedrive by title or associated contacts.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_lead
tools.description: Delete a lead. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_convert_lead_to_deal
tools.description: Convert a lead into a deal (Pipedrive v2). The conversion runs asynchronously; this tool polls until it completes (typically under 5s) and returns the new deal ID. If it is still running after ~30s, it returns the conversion_id and status for manual follow-up.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_lead_conversion_status
tools.description: Get the status of an async lead-to-deal conversion by conversion ID (Pipedrive v2 GET /leads/{id}/convert/status/{conversion_id}).

tools.name: pipedrive_list_projects
tools.description: List projects from Pipedrive with optional filtering by board, phase, or status. Returns paginated results. (Requires the Projects add-on; Projects API is in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_get_project
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific project by ID. (Requires the Projects add-on; Projects API is in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_create_project
tools.description: Create a new project in Pipedrive. Requires title, board_id, and phase_id. (Requires the Projects add-on; Projects API is in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_update_project
tools.description: Update an existing project in Pipedrive. (Requires the Projects add-on; Projects API is in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_project
tools.description: Delete a project. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true). (Requires the Projects add-on; Projects API is in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_search_projects
tools.description: Search for projects in Pipedrive by title. (Requires the Projects add-on; Projects API is in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_archive_project
tools.description: Archive a project by setting its status to archived. (Requires the Projects add-on; Projects API is in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_list_project_tasks
tools.description: List tasks for a project you already have the ID for — pass only `id` (the project ID). For broader task queries use pipedrive_list_tasks. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_list_project_templates
tools.description: List all project templates available in Pipedrive. Returns paginated results.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_project_template
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific project template by ID.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_archived_projects
tools.description: List archived projects from Pipedrive with optional filtering by filter, phase, or status. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_get_project_permitted_users
tools.description: Get the list of user IDs that have permission to access a project. Returns an array of integer user IDs. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_get_project_changelog
tools.description: Get the changelog for a project, showing what changed, when, and by whom. Returns paginated entries with actor_user_id, new_values, and old_values. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_list_products
tools.description: List products from Pipedrive with optional filtering by owner, IDs, or filter.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_product
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific product by ID.

tools.name: pipedrive_search_products
tools.description: Search for products by name, code, or custom fields.

tools.name: pipedrive_create_product
tools.description: Create a new product in Pipedrive. Only name is required.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_product
tools.description: Update an existing product in Pipedrive.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_product
tools.description: Delete a product. The product will be marked as deleted and permanently removed after 30 days.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_product_variations
tools.description: List all variations for a product.

tools.name: pipedrive_add_product_variation
tools.description: Add a variation to a product.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_product_variation
tools.description: Update an existing product variation.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_product_variation
tools.description: Delete a product variation.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_product_followers
tools.description: List all followers for a product.

tools.name: pipedrive_add_product_follower
tools.description: Add a follower to a product.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_product_follower
tools.description: Remove a follower from a product.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_product_followers_changelog
tools.description: Get the followers changelog for a product.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_product_image
tools.description: Get the image of a product (returns a single image with a public URL valid for 7 days).

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_product_image
tools.description: Delete the image of a product.

tools.name: pipedrive_upload_product_image
tools.description: Upload an image for a product. Provide the image via EITHER file_path OR base64_data (exactly one required). Supports png, jpeg, gif, and webp. Note: file_path is read by the SERVER process via the filesystem and is disabled by default; the operator must set PIPEDRIVE_IMAGE_BASE_DIR and the path must resolve within it; otherwise use base64_data, which is transport-safe.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_product_image
tools.description: Update (replace) the image of a product. Provide the image via EITHER file_path OR base64_data (exactly one required). Supports png, jpeg, gif, and webp. Note: file_path is read by the SERVER process via the filesystem and is disabled by default; the operator must set PIPEDRIVE_IMAGE_BASE_DIR and the path must resolve within it; otherwise use base64_data, which is transport-safe.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_tasks
tools.description: General task query across all projects, with optional project_id, assignee_id, done/milestone, and parent filters. Use for anything beyond a single project's full task list. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_get_task
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific task by ID. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_create_task
tools.description: Create a new task in a project. title and project_id are required. Use boolean is_done/is_milestone (same field names as the GET response); a milestone task must have a due_date. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task. Only id is required; all other fields are optional. Use boolean is_done/is_milestone (same field names as the GET response); a milestone task must have a due_date. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_task
tools.description: Delete a task. If the task has subtasks, those will also be deleted. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true). (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_list_boards
tools.description: List all project boards. Returns the complete list (no pagination — the boards endpoint returns all records at once). (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_get_board
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific project board by ID. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_create_board
tools.description: Create a new project board. name is required. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_update_board
tools.description: Update an existing project board. Only id is required; all other fields are optional. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_board
tools.description: Delete a project board. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true). (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_list_phases
tools.description: List all phases for a project board. board_id is required. Returns the complete list (no pagination — the phases endpoint returns all records for a board at once). (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_get_phase
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific project phase by ID. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_create_phase
tools.description: Create a new project phase. name and board_id are required. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_update_phase
tools.description: Update an existing project phase. Only id is required; all other fields are optional. Set board_id to move this phase to a different board. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_phase
tools.description: Delete a project phase. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true). (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_get_person_emails
tools.description: Get email messages linked to a person (company-wide, all users' emails). Returns metadata for emails from any user's mailbox that are linked to this person. Note: To get full message body, use pipedrive_get_mail_message, but only for emails in YOUR mailbox.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_deal_emails
tools.description: Get email messages linked to a deal (company-wide, all users' emails). Returns metadata for emails from any user's mailbox that are linked to this deal. Note: To get full message body, use pipedrive_get_mail_message, but only for emails in YOUR mailbox.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_mail_threads
tools.description: List mail threads from YOUR mailbox only (authenticated user). Other users' threads are not accessible. Use folder parameter to filter by inbox, drafts, sent, or archive.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_mail_thread
tools.description: Get a mail thread with messages. Access depends on visibility settings - threads visible within deals/persons you can access should work. Returns 404 if the thread isn't accessible to you.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_mail_message
tools.description: Get full email message with body. Access depends on visibility settings - messages linked to deals/persons you can access should work, even if sent by other users.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_organization_fields
tools.description: List all organization field definitions, including custom fields. Use this to map 40-character field keys to human-readable names.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_deal_fields
tools.description: List all deal field definitions, including custom fields. Essential for understanding deal data structure.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_person_fields
tools.description: List all person field definitions, including custom fields. Use to understand contact data structure.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_product_fields
tools.description: List all product field definitions, including custom fields.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_project_fields
tools.description: List all project field definitions, including custom fields. (Projects add-on; Projects API in public beta.)

tools.name: pipedrive_get_field
tools.description: Get details of a specific field by its key. Useful for looking up what a 40-character hash field key means.

tools.name: pipedrive_create_deal_field
tools.description: Create a deal custom field. field_name and field_type are required. For enum/set types, options is required. The response data.field_code is the 40-char hash you must keep to update or delete the field later.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_deal_field
tools.description: Update a deal custom field by field_code. field_type and field_code cannot be changed.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_deal_field
tools.description: Delete a deal custom field by field_code. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_update_deal_field_options
tools.description: Bulk-update option labels of a deal enum/set field. Atomic: the whole request fails if any option ID does not exist.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_deal_field_options
tools.description: Bulk-delete options of a deal enum/set field. Atomic: fails if any ID does not exist. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_create_person_field
tools.description: Create a person custom field. field_name and field_type are required. For enum/set types, options is required. The response data.field_code is the 40-char hash to keep for later updates.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_person_field
tools.description: Update a person custom field by field_code. field_type and field_code cannot be changed.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_person_field
tools.description: Delete a person custom field by field_code. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_update_person_field_options
tools.description: Bulk-update option labels of a person enum/set field. Atomic: the whole request fails if any option ID does not exist.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_person_field_options
tools.description: Bulk-delete options of a person enum/set field. Atomic: fails if any ID does not exist. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_create_organization_field
tools.description: Create an organization custom field. field_name and field_type are required. For enum/set types, options is required. The response data.field_code is the 40-char hash to keep for later updates.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_organization_field
tools.description: Update an organization custom field by field_code. field_type and field_code cannot be changed.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_organization_field
tools.description: Delete an organization custom field by field_code. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_update_organization_field_options
tools.description: Bulk-update option labels of an organization enum/set field. Atomic: the whole request fails if any option ID does not exist.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_organization_field_options
tools.description: Bulk-delete options of an organization enum/set field. Atomic: fails if any ID does not exist. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_create_product_field
tools.description: Create a product custom field. field_name and field_type are required. For enum/set types, options is required. Product fields use a simpler model: no description, important_fields, or required_fields. The response data.field_code is the 40-char hash to keep for later updates.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_product_field
tools.description: Update a product custom field by field_code. Only field_name and ui_visibility can be changed (product fields have no description/important_fields/required_fields).

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_product_field
tools.description: Delete a product custom field by field_code. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_update_product_field_options
tools.description: Bulk-update option labels of a product enum/set field. Atomic: the whole request fails if any option ID does not exist.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_product_field_options
tools.description: Bulk-delete options of a product enum/set field. Atomic: fails if any ID does not exist. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_list_organizations
tools.description: List organizations from Pipedrive with optional filtering by owner or first letter of name.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_organization
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific organization by ID.

tools.name: pipedrive_create_organization
tools.description: Create a new organization in Pipedrive. Only name is required.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_organization
tools.description: Update an existing organization in Pipedrive.

tools.name: pipedrive_search_organizations
tools.description: Search for organizations by name or address.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_organization
tools.description: Delete an organization. The organization will be marked as deleted and permanently removed after 30 days.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_organization_followers
tools.description: List all followers for an organization.

tools.name: pipedrive_add_organization_follower
tools.description: Add a follower to an organization.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_organization_follower
tools.description: Remove a follower from an organization.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_organization_followers_changelog
tools.description: Get the followers changelog for an organization.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_pipelines
tools.description: List sales pipelines in Pipedrive with cursor pagination. Pipelines contain stages that deals move through.

tools.name: pipedrive_list_stages
tools.description: List stages with cursor pagination, optionally filtered by pipeline. Stages represent steps in the sales process.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_stage
tools.description: Get details of a specific stage by ID.

tools.name: pipedrive_create_pipeline
tools.description: Create a new sales pipeline. Only name is required. Set is_deal_probability_enabled to turn on weighted deal probability for the pipeline.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_pipeline
tools.description: Update an existing pipeline. Provide the pipeline id and any fields to change.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_pipeline
tools.description: Delete a pipeline. Marks the pipeline as deleted. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_create_stage
tools.description: Create a new stage in a pipeline. name and pipeline_id are required. Use is_deal_rot_enabled and days_to_rotten to configure deal rotting.

tools.name: pipedrive_update_stage
tools.description: Update an existing stage. Provide the stage id and any fields to change. Set pipeline_id to move the stage to another pipeline.

tools.name: pipedrive_delete_stage
tools.description: Delete a stage. Marks the stage as deleted. Requires PIPEDRIVE_MODE=full (back-compat: PIPEDRIVE_ENABLE_DESTRUCTIVE=true).

tools.name: pipedrive_list_users
tools.description: List all users in the Pipedrive account. Useful for finding owner IDs when creating or filtering records.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_user
tools.description: Get details of a specific user by ID.

tools.name: pipedrive_get_current_user
tools.description: Get details of the current user (API key owner). Useful for verifying connection and getting your user ID.
